weight_type_note: These weights were trained on 5 synthetic disruption samples generated during the initial bootstrap. They are NOT trained on real historical incident data. The heuristic fallback in ml/gnn_stub.py is used when real governance feedback is insufficient. Real training accumulates automatically as operators submit TRUE_POSITIVE/FALSE_POSITIVE verdicts via the governance checkpoint UI, which then enables the /ml/train/gnn endpoint to produce production-quality weights.
